pages.title: 9mm Rounds
pages.text: Small quantities of 9mm ammunition can appear in locked city armory caches. It is more common than a firearm, but not common enough to waste on routine threats.

pages.title: Reload Discipline
pages.text: Reload behind cover and keep reserve ammunition in more than one safehouse. City finds are intended to sustain careful use; dependable stockpiling will eventually come from survivor-network contracts.$(br2)
